intro_cards.title: How About ~?: はどうですか
intro_cards.body:
はどうですか asks for an opinion or offers a suggestion — 'How about ~?' / 'What do you think of ~?'

• お茶はどうですか？(How about some tea?)
• この映画はどうですか？(What do you think of this movie?)
• 週末に行くのはどうですか？
(How about going on the weekend?)

どうですか alone = 'What do you think? / How is it?'

Similar expressions:
• 〜はいかがですか？(formal version)
• 〜しませんか？(invitation: 'would you like to ~?')
